description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/gopherburrow/golang-git. Define a single job named test that runs in the default test stage. In the test job execute the following shell commands in order: export PACKAGE="${CI_PROJECT_URL#https://}"; export PACKAGE_DIR="${GOPATH}/src/${PACKAGE}"; export PACKAGE_PARENT_DIR="${PACKAGE_DIR%/*}"; mkdir -p "${PACKAGE_PARENT_DIR}"; ln -s "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}" "${PACKAGE_DIR}"; cd "${PACKAGE_DIR}" ; go get ./... ; cd "${CI_PROJECT_DIR}"; and finally go test -cover ${PACKAGE}. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
